title: scopolia pendula
intro: Scopolia pendula, also known as Devil's Breath or Angel's Trumpet, is a perennial plant belonging to the Solanaceae family, native to North America. The plant contains scopolamine and hyoscyamine, alkaloids that possess medicinal properties, including anticholinergic and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Scopolia pendula include relief from muscle spasms, pain management, and potentially treating conditions such as glaucoma and motion sickness. Herbal preparations of Scopolia pendula can be found in various forms, including tinctures, teas, and capsules, although caution should be exercised when using the plant due to its potential side effects.
